rationale: For Ukrainians, the war continues at maximum background intensity; the approaching US-Iran deal is watched closely as it could shift US diplomatic and military attention away from Ukraine support.

top_events.title: Iran claims deal with US near; 'lots of things can still go wrong'
top_events.summary: A US-Iran deal nearing conclusion risks diverting US diplomatic focus and resources from Ukraine, a concern for Kyiv. No qualitative shift yet but trajectory is worrying.

top_events.title: Israel carries out air strikes on Lebanon
top_events.summary: Israeli strikes on Lebanon further complicate the Middle East picture and US attention, indirectly reducing bandwidth for Ukraine support diplomacy.

top_events.title: Gaza post-ceasefire deaths hit 983 as Israeli attack targets refugee camp
top_events.summary: Continued Gaza violence keeps global attention and US resources focused on the Middle East rather than Ukraine, an indirect concern for Ukrainian residents.
